name: chat
methodology: OrchestratorGPUInference.generate_text(max_new_tokens=64) on a single cold prompt; cold load timed separately; speculative decoding ON; greedy/deterministic. KV-cache cold (first turn) — warm first-token would be lower.

not_measured: GPU driver version (read from dxdiag / Device Manager; not introspectable here)
co-resident memory cost when other models are loaded alongside
subjective voice naturalness / visual answer quality

measurements.reply_preview: A local-first AI assistant is an AI system designed to operate entirely on a user's local device, ensuring data privacy by keeping all processing and storage offline without relying on external networks or cloud services.
measurements.methodology: OrchestratorGPUInference.generate_text(max_new_tokens=64) on a single cold prompt; cold load timed separately; speculative decoding ON; greedy/deterministic. KV-cache cold (first turn) — warm first-token would be lower.
